title: Cooler Cacti
description: Hue-shifts Cactus Green to fill a gap in Minecraft's palette
body:
![New dye palette](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e287e1e8369e1cd723d6446328b9e64d7684c86_0.webp)
Both green dyes in Minecraft have nearly the same hue, leaving a big gap between Lime and Cyan. This tiny resource pack makes Green Dye **~20% cooler** to better represent the color wheel. Along with vanilla Lime Dye, you'll have access to both a warm and cool shade of green for building. The adjusted color scheme also matches better with green blocks from popular mods, like Create and Supplementaries. Finally, this new shade is just more appealing - green enthusiasts worldwide agree!

You'll need Polytone to see the correct banner and leather armor textures.
